name: New Balance
description: New Balance specializes in high-quality athletic footwear, including a range of running shoes like the Fresh Foam X 1080v12 and FuelCell Propel v4, designed for comfort and fit.

name: Runners Need
description: Runners Need offers a wide selection of running shoes and gear, with expert advice available in-store. They provide free next day delivery on orders over £100.

name: Up & Running UK
description: ASICS offers a range of running shoes, including their most comfortable stability shoe yet, the Kayano 30, designed for a plush ride and excellent traction. Additionally, New Balance's More V4 and FuelCell SuperComp Elite V3 are highlighted as top choices for runners.

name: Shoe Palace
description: Shoe Palace offers the Nike Zoom Fly 5 Men's Running Shoes, designed for both training and race day. These shoes provide comfort and reliability, enhancing your running experience with a propulsive sensation.

name: i-Run
description: Since 2007, i-Run has been a leading online retailer specializing in running gear, offering a wide selection of running and trail shoes for both men and women. They feature prominent brands and models, including Nike Pegasus and Asics Gel Nimbus, along with expert guidance to help customers choose the perfect pair.

name: DR3
description: The company specializes in high-quality running shoes, such as the DR3 ROAD RUNNER 1, designed for athletes and active individuals. Their focus on innovative design and performance-enhancing features makes their footwear suitable for various sports and lifestyles.

name: Bata
description: Bata offers the Power Connect Sports Sneaker, designed for both casual and competitive running, featuring support, comfort, and cushioning. With its knit upper and phylon outsole, this sneaker ensures a comfortable experience, making it an excellent choice for runners.

name: WSS
description: WSS offers a variety of athletic footwear, including the Brooks Range 2 women's road running shoes, which are designed for new runners with soft cushioning and a comfortable fit. The shoes feature engineered mesh for breathability, ensuring cool comfort during runs.

name: Zappos
description: Zappos is an e-commerce retailer that specializes in the sale of shoes, including running shoes like the Scarpa Rapid. The company is dedicated to exceptional customer service and creating a positive shopping experience.

name: Allbirds
description: Allbirds produces a variety of footwear, including their Men's SuperLight Trainers, designed for comfort and breathability, making them suitable for everyday adventures and workouts. The company's commitment to sustainability and use of natural materials adds to the appeal of their running shoes.
